title: Light Zanzibari Poffertjes Keto Pancakes
description: A keto twist on traditional Dutch poffertjes. These light and airy pancakes are infused with the exotic flavors of Zanzibar.

ingredients.name: Light Zanzibari flour
ingredients.notes: Almond flour or coconut flour work well too

ingredients.name: Richly sweetened cream
ingredients.notes: Use full-fat coconut cream or heavy cream

ingredients.name: Silky unsalted butter
ingredients.notes: Use a dairy-free alternative if needed

ingredients.name: Zanzibari spices
ingredients.notes: Use a mix of cinnamon, nutmeg, and cardamom

ingredients.name: Granulated sweetener
ingredients.notes: Use a sugar-free sweetener like stevia or erythritol

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sweetener, and spices.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together cream, eggs, and melted butter.
3. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until just combined.
4. The batter should still be slightly lumpy.
5. Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
6. Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the pan.
7. Cook for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface.
8. Flip the poffertjes and cook for another 1-2 minutes.
9. Serve warm with your favorite toppings, such as butter, sugar-free syrup, or fresh fruit.
